evidence.description: Masoud Khamenei is married to the daughter of Mohsen Kharazi (Tehran's representative in the Assembly of Experts), making Mohsen Kharrazi his father-in-law.

evidence.source_title: Who's Who in Iran's Network of Powerful Families?
evidence.description: The marriage between Masoud Khamenei and Mohsen Kharrazi's daughter links the Khamenei and Kharrazi family networks.

editorial_notes: Masoud is the son-in-law of Mohsen Kharrazi. Existing connection mohsen-kharrazi-family-of-ali-khamenei captures the co-fathers-in-law link.
